title: .github: unify `opendownstream-pr` workflow for multiple repo
body: opendownstream workflow should open PR's for both `podman` and `buildah`.

comments.body:
Would it not be best to simply use a matrix to run the same job on each repo
https://docs.github.com/en/actions/how-tos/write-workflows/choose-what-workflows-do/run-job-variations?

> Would it not be best to simply use a matrix to run the same job on each repo https://docs.github.com/en/actions/how-tos/write-workflows/choose-what-workflows-do/run-job-variations?

Oh I haven't explored this, let me investigate this.
